gazette: Official Gazette No. 32769 dated 31 December 2024, 4th Duplicate
title: Communiqué on Import Control of Certain Products Requiring the "CE" Mark (Product Safety and Control: 2025/9)
bodyHtml:
The Communiqué on Import Control of Certain Products Requiring the “CE” Mark (Product Safety and Control: 2025/9) has been published.

While no changes were made in the application of the Communiqué, some changes were made to the list of goods subject to CE. Due to the changes, a temporary article regarding the transition period was added. The provisions of the new Communiqué will not be applied until 28/2/2025 (including this date) regarding the newly added GTIPs.

The transition process

TEMPORARY ARTICLE 1 - (1) Importation of products for which a transport document was issued in the country of origin before 1/1/2025 to be shipped to Turkey for export purposes or which were submitted to the customs administrations in accordance with the Customs Legislation shall be finalised in accordance with the Communiqué on Import Control of Certain Products Requiring to Bear the "CE" Mark (Product Safety and Control: 2024/9), which was repealed by Article 15, upon the request of the importer company, until 28/2/2025 (including this date).

(2) The provisions of this Communiqué shall not be applied to the import of products within the scope of GTIPs that are not specified in Annex-2 of the Communiqué on Import Control of Certain Products Requiring to Bear the “CE” Mark (Product Safety and Control: 2024/9), which is included in Annex-2 but repealed by Article 15, until 28/2/2025 (inclusive) . This paragraph shall not be applied to GTIPs that differ due to the changes made in the Turkish Customs Tariff Schedule Divided into Statistical Positions.


Please click for the products covered by the Communique.

CHANGES MADE IN THE REGULATIONS GOVERNING PRODUCTS INSPECTED FOR IMPORT

Changes have been made to the product group scope

Electric Motors, Household Lamps, Electric Lamps, Armatures, Air Conditioners, Fans, Vacuum Cleaners, Water Pumps, Dishwashers, Washing Machines / Dryers, Televisions, Refrigerators / Freezers
